productDisplayName: Homme Men Brown Semi Formal Shoes
description: This hardwearing footwear from homme is a shoe closet essential, referencing French class and fusing it with modern design details for the perfect semi-formal ensemble. Crafted to capture the season's hottest trends, this pair tops our wish-list!UpperMid top styling with textured leather upperSlip-on styling with a tapering toe designZippers at the sides of the tongue for easy insertion of footReinforced overlay at the heelPadded footbedUpper adhered to the outsole for maximum durabilityOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelHoneycomb shaped lugs on the forefoot and heelShoe careWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
